subcodes.first_line: In this day the tongue of bounty maketh mention of His chosen ones and calleth all to the horizon of the heaven of manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز لسان فضل اولیای خود را ذکر مینماید و کل را بافق سماء ظهور دعوت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
